subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein all things are enraptured and gladdened by the fragrant breaths of the utterance of the Lord of Names, and all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم یومیست که جمیع اشیا از نفحات بیان مالک اسما محظوظ و مسرورند و کل آفرینش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for spiritual recognition
